series_metadata.series_description: These files contain information on credit unions that are chartered with the State of Ohio who voluntarily liquidate their assets.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility six (6) years from dissolution ; Electronic: electronic files six (6) years from dissolution
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
